description: Lock early_symbolic_communication to source-backed abstract graphic marks rather than generic ritual, oral tradition, or later notation systems.

checks.reason: The corrected node is anchored to the approximately 73,000-year-old Blombos abstract ochre drawing.
The dated Blombos anchor used intentionally applied red ochre pigment, but pigment should remain enabling because not every later symbolic sign uses pigment.
The Blombos graphic-mark evidence should not imply shamanic mediation or generic animism as a direct prerequisite.
Visual abstract marks should not depend directly on spoken narrative transmission without source evidence.
Proto-writing is a later dependent notation system and must not become a prerequisite of early graphic signs.
